test_cases.intent: valid payload enters Big5 V2 rendered preview path and renders canonical sections
invalid/malformed payload must not crash and must not invent new body copy
missing O59 preview payload must use existing legacy path without claiming rendered preview passed
must_assert: no false pass for rendered preview

test_cases.intent: PDF/share/history/compare are tested only if existing harness supports them
must_assert: pending surfaces do not count as passed

do_not: do not create backend runtime wiring
do not write new body copy
do not claim PDF/share/history/compare passed without harness
revision_notes: v0.1.1 fixes manifest file list/count consistency.
v0.1.1 deduplicates surfaces arrays, including duplicated pdf entries.
v0.1.1 strengthens contextual all matching: no raw substring scan.

required_codex_final_report.tested_surfaces: array of surfaces for which tests actually ran
required_codex_final_report.pending_surfaces: array of conditional surfaces without existing harness or intentionally skipped with reason
required_codex_final_report.passed_surfaces: array of tested surfaces that passed all blocking assertions
required_codex_final_report.failed_surfaces: array of tested surfaces that failed blocking assertions
required_codex_final_report.rule: pdf/share_card/history/compare cannot be counted as passed unless existing harness actually exercised them.

all_assertion_policy.normalization: trim visible text node; collapse whitespace; compare exact visible token
allowed_context: non-rendered JSON, TypeScript, fixture, or QA metadata
forbidden_context: standalone visible line exactly equal to 'all'
placeholder/debug leakage rendered in facet rows or table cells
raw internal placeholder exposed to user-visible UI
all_assertion_policy.implementation_warning: Do not use raw substring matching for 'all'. Do not fail 'callout', 'allowlisted', or internal code strings.
